12. Sub-Divisions Essential. The effects of a horoscope should be predicted according to the
divisions of Houses. Without knowing the strength of such Lords, one cannot lay even a step
forward in the direction of astrology.
13. Vargothamamsa. The first Navansa of a Movable Rasi, the 5th one in a Fixed Rasi and the 9th
one in a Common (Dual) Rasi are called Vargothamamsa. Should the natal Lagna be in such
Vargothama Navansa, the native becomes an important person in his circle. The rulers of
Dwadasamasas start from that Rasi itself.
14. Lords of Decanates and Horas. The Lords of decanates are first Lord of the same Rasi,
second Lord of the 5th Rasi therefrom and third Lord of the 9th from the Rasi in question. The
